subcodes.first_line: This is the Preserved Tablet, sent down from the presence of God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. Within it floweth the Kawthar of life eternal. Verily [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح محفوظ نزل من لدی الله المهیمن القیوم و فیه جری کوثر الحیوان انه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
